infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SwingBy uses your location to show nearby service providers.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: SwingBy uses your location to show nearby service providers.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SwingBy needs access to your photos so you can attach images to a job post.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SwingBy needs camera access so you can take a photo for your job post.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: SwingBy uses Face ID to unlock the app quickly, if you turn it on in Settings.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SwingBy uses your location to show nearby service providers.

plugins.photosPermission: SwingBy needs access to your photos to add images to a job post.
plugins.cameraPermission: SwingBy needs camera access to take a photo for a job post.
